lessons.key: spec_deviation::when the spring boot starter parent bom bumps flyway to 10 x add org flywaydb flyway database postgresql explicitly flyway core alone throws unsupported database against postgres 16 since postgresql support was split into its own module
lessons.text: When the spring-boot-starter-parent BOM bumps Flyway to 10.x, add org.flywaydb:flyway-database-postgresql explicitly - flyway-core alone throws Unsupported Database against Postgres 16+ since PostgreSQL support was split into its own module.
evidence: 63face0:pom.xml SPEC_DEVIATION note; validated by removing the dependency and reproducing the boot failure in validation.md (pom.xml,flyway,persistence)
